If you're working in Backend, this is definitely a project worth watching — and adopting.

Final Thoughts

shuttleposereview is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
